---
title: "Depression care sites"
author: "Allie Lake"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    theme: united
    toc_depth: 4
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
pacman::p_load(data.table, dplyr, ggplot2, PheWAS, openxlsx, foreach, ggthemr, ggrepel, ggpubr, RColorBrewer, lubridate)
options(scipen=999)
ggthemr_reset()

source("/data/davis_lab/allie/care_sites/scripts/mdd_application/manhattan_bar.R")
```

```{r}
map <- fread("/data/davis_lab/allie/care_sites/output/CareSiteMap_Multispecialty_Long_UPDATED_AML_010425.csv")
care_site_names <- read.xlsx("/data/davis_lab/allie/care_sites/output/CareSite_VisitDetailCount_UPDATED_AML_010425.xlsx") %>%
  select(care_site_id, care_site_name) %>% 
  data.table() %>% 
  unique()

map <- merge(map, care_site_names, by = "care_site_id")
```

```{r}
dep_code_list <- unique(rbind(PheWAS::phecode_map_icd10, PheWAS::phecode_map)) %>%
  filter(phecode %in% c("296.2", "296.22")) %>% 
  select(code, vocabulary_id) %>%
  distinct()
```

## Extract depression ICD codes
```{r load_icd, eval = FALSE}
## load all codes from the 2023 SD pull
x_codes <- fread("../../data/sd_data_qc/20230607_sd_pull_x_codes_dates_cleaned_overlapping_grids.txt")
unique(x_codes$vocabulary_id) #  "CDT" "CPT4" "HCPCS" "ICD10CM" "ICD10PCS" "ICD9CM" "ICD9Proc"

## restrict to icd codes for depression
icd_dep <- x_codes %>% filter(vocabulary_id %in% c("ICD10CM", "ICD9CM")) %>% 
  inner_join(dep_code_list, by = c("concept_code" = "code", "vocabulary_id")) %>%
  select(GRID, entry_date, entry_datetime, vocabulary_id, concept_code, concept_name, visit_occurrence_id, item_position, age_at_event) %>% 
  as.data.frame %>% data.table() %>% unique()

saveRDS(icd_dep, "/data/davis_lab/allie/care_sites/data/mdd_application/20230607_sd_pull_x_codes_icd_depression_010525.Rds")
```

```{r}
## load depression icd codes
icd_dep <- readRDS("/data/davis_lab/allie/care_sites/data/mdd_application/20230607_sd_pull_x_codes_icd_depression_010525.Rds") %>% 
  select(GRID, entry_date, entry_datetime, vocabulary_id, concept_code, concept_name, visit_occurrence_id, age_at_event) %>% 
  data.table() %>% 
  unique()

icd_dep$entry_datetime <- as_datetime(icd_dep$entry_datetime)

table(icd_dep$vocabulary_id)
```

## Select each patient's *earliest* depression code
```{r}
icd_dep[, earliest_code := min(entry_datetime), by = GRID]
icd_dep_earliest <- unique(icd_dep[entry_datetime == earliest_code, .(GRID,entry_date,entry_datetime,visit_occurrence_id)])

n_distinct(icd_dep_earliest$GRID) # 200350 total individuals with depression codes
nrow(icd_dep_earliest) # 205244 total entries
```

## Map depression codes to care sites
Try mapping by visit_occurrence_id AND by date.
```{r, eval = TRUE}
## load all visit data from 2023 SD pull that map to a defined care site (not missing, Unclear, or Administrative)
## (generated in compile_data.R)
vdat <- readRDS("/data/davis_lab/allie/care_sites/data/mdd_application/20230607_sd_pull_visit_occurrence_defined_sites_010525.Rds")
n_distinct(vdat$GRID) # 2959903 total individuals with a visit mapped to a "defined" care site 

## get the total individual count per care site and per specialty
vdat[,cs_n_grid := n_distinct(.SD$GRID), by = care_site_id]
vdat[,spec_n_grid := n_distinct(.SD$GRID), by = SpecialtyLong]
cs_grid_counts <- unique(vdat[,.(care_site_id, care_site_name, cs_n_grid, SpecialtyLong)])
spec_grid_counts <- unique(vdat[,.(SpecialtyLong, spec_n_grid)])
setorder(cs_grid_counts, -cs_n_grid)
setorder(spec_grid_counts, -spec_n_grid)
saveRDS(cs_grid_counts, "/data/davis_lab/allie/care_sites/data/mdd_application/20230607_sd_pull_defined_sites_individual_counts_by_site_010525.Rds")
saveRDS(spec_grid_counts, "/data/davis_lab/allie/care_sites/data/mdd_application/20230607_sd_pull_defined_sites_individual_counts_by_specialty_010525.Rds")

## map earliest depression icd codes to care sites via visit_occurrence_id
icd_dep_visits_by_id <- merge(icd_dep_earliest, vdat, by = c("GRID","visit_occurrence_id"))
saveRDS(icd_dep_visits_by_id, "/data/davis_lab/allie/care_sites/data/mdd_application/20230607_sd_pull_visit_occurrence_earliest_dep_icd_joined_by_visit_id_010525.Rds")

## map earliest depression icd codes to care sites via date
icd_dep_visits_by_date <- merge(icd_dep_earliest, vdat, by = "GRID", allow.cartesian = TRUE)
icd_dep_visits_by_date <- icd_dep_visits_by_date[entry_date >= visit_start_date & entry_date <= visit_end_date]
saveRDS(icd_dep_visits_by_date, "/data/davis_lab/allie/care_sites/data/mdd_application/20230607_sd_pull_visit_occurrence_earliest_dep_icd_joined_by_date_010525.Rds")

n_distinct(icd_dep_visits_by_id$GRID) # 138491 individuals with earliest depression code mapping to a visit with a DEFINED CARE SITE by date (69.1% of total with depression)
n_distinct(icd_dep_visits_by_date$GRID) # 149607 individuals with earliest depression code mapping to a visit with a DEFINED CARE SITE by date (74.7% of total with depression)
```
Will map by date 1) because there are more individuals and 2) for consistency with the antidepressant analysis.

```{r}
## load file generated above (joined by date)
icd_dep_visits <- readRDS("/data/davis_lab/allie/care_sites/data/mdd_application/20230607_sd_pull_visit_occurrence_earliest_dep_icd_joined_by_date_010525.Rds")
head(icd_dep_visits)
nrow(icd_dep_visits) # 186107
n_distinct(icd_dep_visits$GRID) # 149607
```

```{r}
## retain unique entries (by GRID, date of ICD code, care site, and specialty)
## there will be duplicates if a care site is mapped to multiple specialties
icd_dep_visits <- unique(icd_dep_visits[,.(GRID,entry_date,care_site_id,care_site_name,SpecialtyLong,cs_n_grid,spec_n_grid)])
nrow(icd_dep_visits) # 186107
n_distinct(icd_dep_visits$GRID) # 149607

nrow(unique(icd_dep_visits[,.(GRID,entry_date,care_site_id)])) # 176016 - number of distinct GRID/care site combos
nrow(unique(icd_dep_visits[,.(GRID,entry_date,care_site_id,care_site_name)])) # 176016 - number of distinct GRID/care site combos (same as above)
nrow(unique(icd_dep_visits[,.(GRID,SpecialtyLong)])) # 180815 - number of distinct GRID/specialty combos
```

Even after restricting to the earliest depression code for each individual and mapping to defined care sites, there are still many individuals with depression codes mapping to multiple different care sites on the same day.
We will keep mutliple entries per individual, but will use the number of unique individuals as the denominator in the care site and specialty frequency calculations.
Otherwise, we would be double-counting individuals with multiple care site visits on the same day. That might bias the results if individuals with depression codes are more likely to have multiple care site visits on the same day, or if certain care sites contribute disproportionately to the total (e.g., radiology or phlebotomy visits, which often co-occur with visits to other sites).

```{r}
paste0("Out of all patients with a depression code, for what % of them does their earliest code map to a visit with a defined specialty? ",
 round((n_distinct(icd_dep_visits$GRID) / n_distinct(icd_dep_earliest$GRID))*100, 2), "%")
```

## Get proportions of individuals with depression codes at each care site and specialty
Normalize by total individual count per care site or specialty.
```{r}
N_dep <- n_distinct(icd_dep_visits$GRID) # 149607 - this will be the denominator for the depression-specific frequencies

icd_dep_visits[,n_dep_per_site := n_distinct(.SD$GRID), by = care_site_id]
icd_dep_visits[,n_dep_per_specialty := n_distinct(.SD$GRID), by = SpecialtyLong]

care_site_summary_dep <- unique(icd_dep_visits[, .(care_site_id, care_site_name, SpecialtyLong, n_dep_per_site, cs_n_grid)])
care_site_summary_dep[,freq_dep_per_site := n_dep_per_site / N_dep]
care_site_summary_dep[,freq_dep_per_site_norm := n_dep_per_site / N_dep / cs_n_grid]

specialty_summary_dep <- unique(icd_dep_visits[, .(SpecialtyLong, n_dep_per_specialty, spec_n_grid)])
specialty_summary_dep[,freq_dep_per_specialty := n_dep_per_specialty / N_dep]
specialty_summary_dep[,freq_dep_per_specialty_norm := n_dep_per_specialty / N_dep / spec_n_grid]
```

## Make supplemental tables
```{r}
care_site_supp <- copy(care_site_summary_dep)
names(care_site_supp) <- c("care_site_id", "care_site_name", "specialty", "n_depression_patients_per_site", "n_total_patients_per_site", "prop_depression_patients_per_site","prop_depression_patients_per_site_normalized")
setorder(care_site_supp, -n_depression_patients_per_site)

specialty_supp <- copy(specialty_summary_dep)
names(specialty_supp) <- c("specialty", "n_depression_patients_per_specialty", "n_total_patients_per_specialty", "prop_depression_patients_per_specialty","prop_depression_patients_per_specialty_normalized")
setorder(specialty_supp, -n_depression_patients_per_specialty)

## write to excel
wb <- createWorkbook()
addWorksheet(wb, "Care Site Summary")
writeData(wb, "Care Site Summary", care_site_supp)
addWorksheet(wb, "Specialty Summary")
writeData(wb, "Specialty Summary", specialty_supp)
saveWorkbook(wb, "/data/davis_lab/allie/care_sites/output/mdd_application/SupplementalTable_depression_care_site_specialty_summary_010525.xlsx", overwrite = TRUE)
```

## Plots
```{r}
## reformat data frame for plotting
caresite_plot_df <- care_site_summary_dep %>% 
  filter(SpecialtyLong != "Phlebotomy" & SpecialtyLong != "Radiology"  & SpecialtyLong != "Research") %>%
  filter(n_dep_per_site >=100) %>%
  select(care_site_id, care_site_name, 
    specialty = SpecialtyLong, n_phe_per_site = n_dep_per_site, 
    freq_phe_per_site = freq_dep_per_site, freq_phe_per_site_norm = freq_dep_per_site_norm) %>%
  data.table()

p1 <- caresite_manhattan_bar(caresite_plot_df, points = T, flip = F) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Proportion of diagnoses per care site\n") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0,0.075,0.005), limits = c(0,0.075)) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank())

## create a second version of the plot, normalizing by total individual count per care site
caresite_plot_df_norm <- caresite_plot_df %>%
  select(-freq_phe_per_site) %>% 
  rename(freq_phe_per_site = freq_phe_per_site_norm) %>% 
  mutate(freq_phe_per_site = freq_phe_per_site * 10000) %>%
  data.table()

p2 <- caresite_manhattan_bar(caresite_plot_df_norm, points = T, flip = T) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Proportion of diagnoses per care site\n(normalized by per-site individual count)") +
  scale_y_reverse(breaks = rev(seq(0,0.035,0.005)), limits = c(0.035,0))

p <- ggarrange(p1, p2, ncol=1,nrow=2)

pdf("/data/davis_lab/allie/care_sites/output/mdd_application/earliest_dep_site_counts_mapped_by_date_miami_points_010525.pdf", width = 11, height = 8.5)
print(p)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
print(p)
```
